message:
Add comprehensive TUI package test coverage improvements

- tui/history: 86.7% → 98.3% coverage
  - Added tests for loadHistoryData, loadDataCmd, tickCmd
  - Added test harness for database integration tests

- tui/patterns: 80% → 96.7% coverage
  - Added tests for loadPatternChanges, performAction
  - Added tests for loadDataCmd, approveCmd, rejectCmd

- tui/dashboard: 72% → 91.9% coverage
  - Added tests for loadData, loadCmd, moveSelection
  - Added tests for render functions with proper arguments

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
